caption: The video shows a man riding a green four-wheeler ATV out of a garage. He is wearing a dark jacket and jeans, and he appears to be maneuvering the vehicle carefully as he exits. The garage is dimly lit, with various items and equipment visible inside, including another ATV parked on the right side. Outside, the ground is concrete, and there is a patch of grass near the garage entrance. The man seems to be heading towards an open area outside the garage, possibly for a ride or some outdoor activity. The scene suggests a rural or suburban setting, with the garage serving as a storage space for vehicles and tools.
